# NexVid LLMs Policy

site: https://nexvid.online
name: NexVid
summary: Streaming discovery hub for movies and TV shows with watchlists, search, and playback features.

## Allowed
- Public informational pages and metadata
- Non-authenticated browsing pages
- robots.txt and sitemap.xml discovery

## Restricted
- /admin
- /api/
- Authenticated user-specific data
- Personal watchlist/account content

## Canonical
- https://nexvid.online/

## Contact
- https://nexvid.online/contact
